chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Spl. Cr. A. T. Acq. Appeal No. 16 of 2021 Spl. Cr. A. T. Acq. Appeal No. 17 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Main Case 25.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Advocate for the Respondent.-.-.-.-. The learned Additional Prosecutor General has informed us that the Special Prosecutor, Rangers, will argue this appeal. The Special Prosecutor is, however, absent. These appeals were filed on 30.12.2020 and have been fixed for hearing 23 times since. On each date, the Special Prosecutor has either remained absent or has sought an adjournment. It appears that the appeals have been filed as a mere formality, with absolutely no interest shown. The appeals are yet to be admitted and, as such, are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
